parsed.summary: This commit primarily adds an interactive menu to /glm:setup when already configured and renames the npm scope from @anthropic to @anthropic-ai. The changes are confined to documentation (commands/setup.md), metadata files (package.json, plugin configs), and release notes (CHANGELOG.md, release_card.md). No executable code, no data mutations, no auth/permission changes, no state management. Since this is a Claude Plugin (commands are markdown files interpreted by Claude), the 'interactive menu' is a prompt instruction, not a code path. No material ship-blocking risks identified.
